title: Account Service event payload (v1)
description: Payload shape shared by account.created, account.restricted, account.suspended, account.closed (docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 20.1; event names via ADR-002). Produced by epd2_account_service.events.build_account_event. Wraps into the canonical envelope's `payload` field (see event-envelope.schema.json).
